title: Andy Hobson
extract: Andrew Hobson (born 26 December 1978) is a British former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s, 2000s and 2010s. He played at club level for the Stanley Rangers ARLFC, Halifax, the Widnes Vikings, the Dewsbury Rams, the Leigh Centurions, and the Blackpool Panthers, as a prop.
